title: Tactical unit
content:
{{Top|leg|canon=ISB Tactical}}
A '''tactical unit''' was a combat force from the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]]. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], one such unit was assigned aboard the Star Destroyer [[Reprisal (Imperial II-class)|''Reprisal'']], reinforcing the observers already deployed to the ship under [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Drelfin]], and charged with operations against [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] cells and sympathizers in [[Shelsha sector/Legends|Shelsha sector]].

This unit consisted of just ten [[Squad/Legends|squads]] of ISB agents plus two squads of [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends#ISB stormtroopers|Imperial Security Bureau stormtroopers]] drawn from [[Commission for the Preservation of the New Order/Legends|COMPNOR's]] own cadres. In total, it contained the equivalent of just two or three [[Platoon/Legends|platoons]] of troops, less than one full [[Company/Legends|company]]—yet it was a self-contained command with its own [[Droid/Legends|droids]] and intelligence support as well as the stormtroopers, and warranted a [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] as its [[Senior officer/Legends|senior officer]], [[Vak Somoril]].

The tactical unit was also equipped with a pool of small spaceships for use on covert missions, outwardly nondescript, but in fact extensively upgraded with high-tech equipment, arsenals of military hardware, and infiltration equipment: an old [[Yacht/Legends|space yacht]], several outmoded troop transports and a number of [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighters]], all of which were berthed in the ''Reprisal''{{'s}} Hangar Bay 5.

Thoroughly committed to the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]], ISB tactical units operated outside the normal chain of command, and regarded their own priorities as overriding those of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]], [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] and even the [[Stormtrooper Corps/Legends|Stormtrooper Corps]]. It is not clear quite where within the overall ISB hierarchy a tactical unit stood, but it may have combined personnel from several separate sections of the organization, such as [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends#Investigations|Investigations]] and [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends#Enforcement|Enforcement]]. The personnel assigned to these commands certainly appear to have been highly-trained elite troops, in contrast to the turbo-cannon fodder of [[CompForce/Legends|CompForce]].

==Appearances==
*[[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']] {{Ab|Allegiance (audiobook)}}
